title: neeragrostis contrerasii
intro: Neeragrostis contrerasii, also known as Mexican grama, is a type of perennial grass native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neeragrostis contrerasii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
